data.body: AC amendment (Gap: missing_error_path): Lockfile MUST be removed on any non-normal exit path: (1) subprocess failure (figma-api-fetch.sh or figma-merge.py returns non-zero), (2) user declines confirmation in interactive mode, (3) SIGTERM/SIGINT. Use Python try/finally block (not only atexit) to guarantee cleanup. Add AC: 'When figma-merge.py returns non-zero exit, lockfile is removed and figma-resync.py exits 1'. Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/unit/test_figma_resync.py::test_lock_cleanup_on_failure -q
